results.Author: Alex Kim
results.Preview: Twelve-month renewal of the 120-seat AsterPrint management suite license for Summit Trail Software, requested ahead of the current term expiration. The renewal quote was raised under support case CAS-260134 and customer success lead Jae Park has confirmed budget approval pending final signature. Pricing holds the prior-term rate with a 3 percent uplift and adds the remote configuration service pack.
results.Title: Summit Trail Software License Renewal Agreement FY2026

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Statement of work covering quarterly preventive maintenance for production-floor print and labeling equipment at the Erie plant, including the label printers adjacent to line three. Coverage includes a four-hour on-site response commitment, which was exercised during the line three spindle vibration downtime tracked as case CAS-260132. Plant maintenance lead Tom Okafor is the named site contact.
results.Title: Granite Peak Manufacturing Maintenance Services SOW

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Master services agreement governing managed print, document capture, and on-site service for all Riverbend Medical Group clinic locations. Includes patient-privacy handling terms for device hard-drive sanitization at end of lease and names Priya Natarajan as the customer relationship owner. Order-level pricing is set by attached schedules rather than this master document.
results.Title: Riverbend Medical Group Master Services Agreement

results.Author: Alex Kim
results.Preview: Master services agreement for branch printing and secure document workflows across all Bluegrass Credit Union branches. Contains audit-support and chain-of-custody terms for member document handling, with Marcus Webb signing as member services manager. Renewal is automatic annually unless notice is given ninety days before term end.
results.Title: Bluegrass Credit Union Master Services Agreement

results.Author: Sam Patel
results.Preview: Draft statement of work for deploying office environment sensor kits across Prairie Wind Energy Cooperative control rooms and district offices. Scope was expanded after the substation feeder fault telemetry review under case CAS-260128 to include export integration testing with grid operations supervisor Elena Vasquez. Awaiting customer legal review of the data-sharing appendix.
results.Title: Prairie Wind Energy Sensor Deployment SOW

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Municipal managed print services agreement covering city hall, the permit office, and the public records annex. The current term expires this quarter and city clerk Dana Whitfield has initiated the procurement cycle for renewal, with pricing held flat contingent on council approval. Includes public-records compliant retention of print job logs.
results.Title: City of Alder Creek Managed Print Services Agreement

results.Author: Sam Patel
results.Preview: Statement of work adding sensor kit monitoring and alert label printing for refrigeration cases at the Tacoma store. The cold chain temperature excursion in the produce section, case CAS-260133, triggered the expanded alerting scope now covered here. Store operations manager Rosa Delgado receives the weekly exception report.
results.Title: Harbor Lights Grocery Refrigeration Monitoring SOW

results.Author: Alex Kim
results.Preview: Campus-wide master services agreement for managed print and course-material production across Lakeview University libraries, departments, and the student print center. Includes semester-based volume tiers and an accessibility clause for alternate-format course packets. HR benefits administrator Harper Lindqvist coordinated the employee print benefit rider.
results.Title: Lakeview University Campus Print MSA

results.Author: Sam Patel
results.Preview: Draft renewal of document services for Beacon Hill Staffing Partners, expanded to cover contractor onboarding paperwork kits. Finalization is blocked on the contractor onboarding background check issue tracked as case CAS-260135, since the onboarding packet volume drives the pricing tier. Talent operations director Nina Kowalski is reviewing the draft.
results.Title: Beacon Hill Staffing Partners Services Renewal

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Task order agreement for secure document production and grant reporting support services at Federal Plaza Services Agency. The current review cycle incorporates corrective language after a grant drawdown report was rejected for a missing form, tracked as case CAS-260136. Contracting officer representative Samuel Greer holds signature authority.
results.Title: Federal Plaza Services Agency Task Order Agreement

results.Author: Alex Kim
results.Preview: Statement of work for matter-file records management services at Willow Brook Legal, including shelf delivery, labeling, and quarterly archive box rotation. Records manager Talia Stone signs off on each rotation manifest. Confidentiality terms incorporate the firm's client-matter privilege requirements by reference.
results.Title: Willow Brook Legal Records Management SOW

results.Author: Sam Patel
results.Preview: Statement of work covering route manifest and freight label printing infrastructure across Silver Elm Logistics distribution hubs. Includes replacement hardware provisioning for the Denver hub and a document capture pilot for proof-of-delivery scanning. Route manager Miles Vega coordinates hub scheduling windows.
results.Title: Silver Elm Logistics Fleet Print SOW

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Expired master services agreement for workbook production and engagement document services at Harbor Pine Consulting. The term lapsed last month and engagement manager Felix Xu has asked for a refreshed draft rather than an extension, citing changed engagement volumes. Historical pricing schedules are retained for reference only.
results.Title: Harbor Pine Consulting Master Services Agreement

results.Author: Alex Kim
results.Preview: Renewal of course packet production and training room equipment services for Foxglove Learning. Program director Hugo Bell requested the index-page quality checks added as a standard step after last term's course packet issues. Renewal pricing reflects a reduced signage scope following the training room signage cancellation.
results.Title: Foxglove Learning Training Services Renewal
